cleanTargets.description: Temporary files created by applications and the current user session
System-wide temporary files shared across all users; cleared on reboot
Per-user application and system log files
System-wide log files from macOS services and installed applications
Crash and hang reports generated by macOS for user-space processes
Cached Quick Look thumbnails for Finder previews; rebuilt automatically
Apple Type Services font rendering cache; rebuilt automatically on next use
Window positions and state saved by apps for Resume on relaunch
Xcode build products, indexes, and intermediate files; rebuilt on next build
Cached data for iOS/tvOS/watchOS simulator devices
System-wide crash, hang, and spin reports from macOS services and kernel
Legacy Apple System Log archive files; replaced by unified logging on modern macOS
Font registry cache files; rebuilt automatically on demand
System-wide cached application icon data; rebuilt automatically
Cached data from macOS diagnostics and system reports
Cached HTTP/HTTPS response data from system network requests
Logs from the macOS automatic cache management service
Caches from sandboxed Mac App Store and notarized applications; rebuilt automatically
Diagnostic log files copied from connected iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS devices
Xcode component and documentation download cache; re-downloaded on demand
Swift Package Manager resolved package cache; re-downloaded on demand
Xcode Instruments and developer tools cache; rebuilt automatically
